# mtncloud_group (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud group/site by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_group" "az1" {
  name = "MTNNG_CLOUD_AZ_1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the group/site to look up.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the group is active.
- `cloud_ids` (List of Number) IDs of the clouds/zones attached to this group.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the group.
- `location` (String) Location of the group.
